plan.description: Plan OpenSpec-first closeout work before editing the repository.
plan.prompt: Work in an OpenSpec-first repository. Read openspec/specs/* and the active change in openspec/changes/repo-closeout-normalization/ before proposing significant workflow, documentation, or architecture changes. Keep plans concise, preserve master as the default branch, and avoid unnecessary parallel work.

build.description: Implement repository cleanup, bug fixes, and closeout hardening.
build.prompt: Implement against openspec/specs/* and the active closeout change. Prefer cleanup, consolidation, bug fixing, and verification over feature expansion. Keep MCP and plugin usage lean, prefer one coherent long-running session over fleet-style fragmentation, and run the full repository validation gate before claiming completion.
